name: Fisetin vascular function trial is active without posted results
summary: The fisetin vascular function trial in older adults is active-not-recruiting and had no posted ClinicalTrials.gov results at the checked registry update.
statement: The registry record establishes an active fisetin trial-watch item but contributes no result-bearing efficacy evidence until posted or published results are available.
population_or_model: Older adults in a phase 1/2 fisetin vascular function trial
caveats: Registry-only evidence must not be counted as a positive or negative treatment effect.
Needs surveillance for posted results or linked publication.
